view.title: Validate persona scenario #4

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the behavior of the system under the scenario of multiple waitlist priorities, but the evidence provided does not confirm that the system behaves as expected in this context. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving simultaneous notifications and a first-come basis for booking, it lacks concrete evidence demonstrating that the system correctly implements this behavior. Specifically, there is no evidence showing the outcome of the scenario or how the system handles multiple claims, leading to an inconclusive status.

gaps: No evidence of the system's behavior when multiple users attempt to claim a spot simultaneously.
